title: Marbled's API [MAPI] [DISCONTINUED]
description: A library mod that contains common code and content for all of MarbledNull's mods
body:
### **AS OF 9/19/2024, MARBLED'S API IS DISCONTINUED. MARBLED'S API'S FEATURES LIKE STEEL HAVE BEEN MOVED INTO MARBLED'S CORE, PLEASE USE IT INSTEAD.**

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/marbleds-core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/marbleds-core)

Old description.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Page Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42720b232c54f4a3e78886a70223f01469f0340d.png)
![MAPI Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a836fe01b9b5ddd3238074364741b8f7f8773ecf.png)
### 📖About

Marbled's API is a library mod that shares the common code and Steel material for all of my mods, making it easier to develop my mods such as Marbled's Arsenal, Marbled's Villager Hats and ect. This mod is not meant to be a standalone mod. 

### ✨Features


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Raw Steel
- Steel
- Steel Sheets
- Steel Block
- Hardened Steel
- Hardened Steel Sheets
- Rubber

- Custom ArmorMaterials class for Marbled's mods (MA, MVH, MSCP)

</details>



 
![Page Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42720b232c54f4a3e78886a70223f01469f0340d.png)
### ❗Discord

Join the official MarbledHubb Discord server to report bugs, issues, contact me, or talk with the community

[https://discord.com/invite/aUX4MX7BAJ](https://discord.com/invite/aUX4MX7BAJ)
![Page Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42720b232c54f4a3e78886a70223f01469f0340d.png)
### 🛑Usage

- You may NOT re-distribute this mod. 
- You may NOT use or steal any content from this mod including textures or models. 

![Page Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42720b232c54f4a3e78886a70223f01469f0340d.png)

</details>
